step_connect.heading: Select a Repository
step_connect.description: Choose a repository with an existing Telar site.
step_connect.no_repos: No repositories found. Make sure the Telar Compositor GitHub App is installed on your account.

step_sync.heading: Importing Content
step_sync.error_not_telar: This doesn't appear to be a Telar site.
step_sync.error_empty_repo: This repository is empty. Select one with an existing Telar site.
step_sync.error_sheets_access: Could not access the published Google Sheet. Please provide the correct URL.

step_review.heading: Import Complete
step_review.sheets_warning: Your site uses Google Sheets as its data source. On your first publish, the compositor will switch to managing content directly and disable the Sheets connection in your site configuration.

step_done.heading: You're All Set!
step_done.description: Your Telar site has been imported successfully.
